name: Maze Escape 3D
description: Maze Escape 3D is a free online escape game for boys with the theme of the maze. You need to quickly walk through the complex maze in a limited time. Many forks require you to distinguish the right road and try every means to find the exit. There are also many modes for you to choose from. You can experience a huge 3D scene by taking adventure here. Come and experience it!
tags: 3D, Android, Boy, Brain, Escape, Fun, HTML5, Kids, Maze, Memory, Online, Puzzle
